Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate (ESR) 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/erythrocyte-sedimentation-rate-esr/ 
Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate (ESR) 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR)? 
Erythrocytes are red blood cells. The sedimentation rate is the time it takes for your red blood cells to settle at the bottom of a test tube. An erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) is a blood test that can show if you have inflammation in your body. Inflamma
